Corrin Refectory (Salem College)
Winston-Salem, NC
Seating Capacity: 0
Venue Type : Misc

Total Gigs: 2
  DMB  (2)

Longest Performance:
04.02.93 - Blue Water (12:17)
Description
Corrin Refectory was the main dining hall at Salem College and was built in 1941.
